text.title: field-descriptions-as-prompts Output Contract
text.summary: Pattern catalog of good descriptions by field shape, with audit checklist.

list.item: Numeric with units: "Total in CENTS as integer. $19.99 -> 1999. Never include currency symbol. Includes tax."
ISO-8601 with edge cases: "ISO-8601 YYYY-MM-DD. If only month visible, use day=01. If only year visible, use 01-01."
Boolean with explicit forbiddance: "True if the message expresses dissatisfaction. Sarcastic praise counts. Pure questions do NOT count."
Enum with choice rules: "low = informational. medium = within a sprint. high = same-day. critical = production down."
Dependent field: "3-sentence summary of `body` above. Same tense and tone."
Forbidden patterns: "kebab-case slug, max 60 chars, ASCII lower. DO NOT include articles (a/an/the). DO NOT include year unless title mentions it."
Every non-trivial field has 1-3 sentences of description.
No description duplicates the field name verbatim.
No description asks the model to explain reasoning.
Dependent fields reference their dependencies by backtick-wrapped name.
